kept.text: “The system was powered from the ship, operated by sailors with less than an hour of training, and engaged every target presented. Every single target was destroyed. 100 percent success”

quoted_tweet.text:
For years, directed energy for counter-UAS has been a promise. Last week, we made it a reality—at sea. In a single day, LOCUST LWS was rolled onto the USS Bush flight deck, powered up, and delivered 100% successful engagements.

The LOCUST Laser Weapon System executed on every measure: flexibility, reliability, and operational impact—at sea, just as it does on land. In a huge milestone for fielded capacity, the P-HEL proved that directed energy can be rapidly deployed and operationally effective across domains.

This is real progress—and there's more to come.

Full story linked in the comments.
